name: SuccessCriterion
description: A WCAG success criterion defining a testable requirement for web content accessibility.

id.description: Unique identifier for the success criterion (e.g., 1.1.1, 2.4.7).

title.description: Short title of the success criterion.

description.description: Full normative text of the success criterion.
description.example: All non-text content that is presented to the user has a text alternative that serves the equivalent purpose.

principle.description: The POUR principle this criterion belongs to.

wcag_version.description: WCAG version that introduced or updated this criterion.

url.description: URL to the official specification text for this criterion.

understanding_url.description: URL to the Understanding WCAG document for this criterion.

sufficient_techniques.description: List of sufficient technique identifiers for meeting this criterion.

failures.description: List of failure technique identifiers that fail this criterion.
